home_page__hero_description: An opinionated Vite Plus (Vite+) monorepo featuring TanStack Start, Dockerized deployments, Paraglide.js (i18n), Hono, oRPC, drizzle-orm, better-auth, and more.
home_page__integrations__description: TanStack Start works with most major cloud providers and JavaScript runtimes thanks to the Nitro Vite plugin and our Docker templates.
home_page__cta_description: Read our documentation to get started with tsu-stack or check out our GitHub repository.
onboarding_page__description: Create a business workspace or continue with an existing one before configuring accounting settings.
onboarding_page__no_businesses: No businesses yet. Create one to continue.
onboarding_page__create_description: The slug becomes the stable URL reference for this business.
onboarding_page__business_slug_hint: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
onboarding_page__missing_business: Add a business name and slug.
organization_setup__description: Organizations are shared workspaces for books, banking, receipts, reports, and team access.
organization_setup__create_description: Set up the workspace URL before moving into business onboarding.
organization_setup__business_slug_hint: Use lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens.
organization_setup__domain_access_descri: Let teammates with the same email domain request access later.
organization_setup__missing_business: Add a business name and URL.
organization_setup__join_description: Paste an invitation link or invitation ID from your teammate.
organization_setup__invitation_descripti: The invitation must be sent to your signed-in email address.
organization_setup__missing_invitation: Paste an invitation link or invitation ID.
onboarding_page__business_details_descri: Confirm the legal name, country, currency, books start date, and fiscal year start used by the business settings row.
onboarding_page__business_contact_descri: Save the primary email used for business records and future document workflows.
onboarding_page__foundation_gate_descrip: This setup creates the Phase 0 settings row before ledger, invoice, banking, GST, and AI workflows arrive.
onboarding_page__workspace_ready_descrip: Continue to the starter workspace after settings save. You can refine these defaults from Business settings.
onboarding_page__connect_bank_descriptio: Save the settings row before later accounting workflows are enabled.
onboarding_page__collect_receipts_descri: Save a primary email for business records and future document workflows.
onboarding_page__prepare_books_descripti: Continue to the starter workspace after setup.
onboarding_page__setup_path_description: Finish the minimum business foundation first; future accounting modules build on this state.
onboarding_page__books_start_date_hint: Transactions before this date stay outside active books.
onboarding_page__primary_email_hint: Use the address that should receive business and account notices.
onboarding_page__receipts_email_hint: Use the address that should receive business and account notices.
onboarding_page__foundation_feature_sett: Business settings row stores legal, fiscal, currency, and contact defaults.
onboarding_page__foundation_feature_audi: Settings updates write an audit record for sensitive account history.
onboarding_page__foundation_feature_phas: Ledger periods, journals, invoices, banking, GST, and AI stay behind later foundation phases.
onboarding_page__workspace_feature_dashb: Starter workspace opens after the settings row is saved.
onboarding_page__workspace_feature_setti: Business settings remains available for edits after onboarding.
onboarding_page__workspace_feature_next: Future accounting screens can rely on this business foundation.
onboarding_page__bank_feature_sync: Business settings row stores legal, fiscal, currency, and contact defaults.
onboarding_page__bank_feature_balance: Settings updates write an audit record for sensitive account history.
onboarding_page__bank_feature_review: Ledger, invoice, banking, GST, and AI workflows stay behind later phases.
onboarding_page__books_feature_transacti: Starter workspace opens after the settings row is saved.
onboarding_page__books_feature_export: Business settings remains available for edits after onboarding.
onboarding_page__books_feature_handoff: Future accounting screens can rely on this business foundation.
onboarding_page__access_pending_descript: An owner must finish this business setup before other members can use the workspace.
business_settings_page__description: Set the legal, fiscal, currency, and contact defaults used across accounting workflows.
business_settings_page__form_description: These defaults anchor books, reports, invoices, and audit history.
business_settings__books_start_date_hint: Transactions before this date stay outside the active books.
business_settings__invalid_input: Check the business settings and try again.
error_404__description_line_1: The page you're looking for might have been
error_500__description_line_2: Please try refreshing the page, or go back home.
auth__terms_agreement: By clicking continue, you agree to our
auth__password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth__name_min_length: Name must be at least 2 characters
